name: HydraScan PRO+ 2026
shortDescription: Ultra-modern hydrodermabrasion-focused multi-device with 8+1 treatment heads, AI skin analysis, 4K micro-camera and digital client card.
description:
The HydraScan PRO+ 2026 is an innovative, hydrodermabrasion-focused multifunctional cosmetic system that combines deep cleansing treatments with intelligent skin analysis. The device effectively cleanses the skin, supports skin renewal, and uses advanced technology to provide a precise picture of the skin's current condition.

The system's specialty is its AI-based skin analysis, which automatically evaluates the results and instantly recommends treatments, cosmetic products, and a personalized at-home skincare routine. The device is therefore not only a diagnostic tool but also active sales support for the salon.

With a large touchscreen, intelligent Android-based system and multiple treatment heads – the ideal choice for modern beauty salons where technology, personalized skincare and efficient service sales are equally important.
metaTitle: HydraScan PRO+ 2026 | 8+1 Function Hydrofacial with Built-in AI Skin Analysis
metaDescription: HydraScan PRO+ 2026 – advanced hydrofacial device: real-time AI skin diagnostics with 4K micro-camera, 8+1 treatment functions, digital treatment diary. 2-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: HydraScan PRO+ 2026 – not just a device, but an intelligent skin diagnostic and sales system
paragraphs: The HydraScan PRO+ 2026 combines traditional facial treatment technologies (hydrodermabrasion, oxygen cleansing, RF, ultrasound, hot-cold hammer, LED) with AI-based skin analysis, making treatments not only more effective but also more personalized.
The 4K micro-camera provides a detailed image of the skin and the AI system automatically recommends treatments, cosmetic products and at-home skincare – active sales support for the salon.
The digital client card automatically records analysis results, takes before-and-after photos, so every client's skin condition can be visibly and measurably tracked.

features.title: 8 treatment heads + AI – everything in a single compact device
features.description:
The HydraScan PRO+ combines 8 different treatment technologies and an AI-based skin analysis module in a single device.
Hydrodermabrasion (Bubble Cleaning)
Oxy-pod active ingredient capsules
Ultrasonic peeling (Skin Scrubber)
Oxy-spray (water + oxygen)
Hot-cold hammer
Bipolar RF lifting
Ultrasonic infusion (Sound Wave)
LED light therapy mask
4K AI skin analysis micro-camera

features.title: Real-time AI skin analysis
features.description:
The 4K skin analysis micro-camera provides detailed images of the skin's surface and microstructure. The intelligent software automatically evaluates the results and recommends treatments and products.

The AI system examines:

pore size, blackheads
wrinkle depth
pigmentation and spots
hydration level
sebum production
elasticity, tone
acne and inflamed areas
traces of UV damage

features.title: OxyPod capsules – personalized, targeted treatment
features.description: OxyPods are special active-ingredient capsules that dissolve during treatment and deliver targeted skincare ingredients into the skin while cleansing. Different capsules are available for different concerns: acne-prone skin, pigmentation spots, dull skin, dehydrated skin, enlarged pores. With hyaluronic acid, vitamins and other actives, the treatment can always be tailored to the client's skin condition – creating an additional revenue stream from capsule treatments.
features.highlight: One device, multiple targeted solutions for different skin concerns.

features.title: Digital client card and before-and-after documentation
features.description:
The HydraScan PRO+ includes a digital client card system that automatically records skin analysis results. Every analysis is stored, so the skin's condition can be tracked from treatment to treatment and compared with photos and charts.
Digital client card for every guest
Documenting skin changes over time
Before-and-after comparison
Professional, personalized advice

features.title: Revenue-generating platform – not just treatments, but sales support
features.description: The HydraScan PRO+ AI skin analysis not only diagnoses but also automatically recommends in-salon treatments, professional products and at-home skincare routines. This boosts treatment series sales, client return rates and cosmetic product sales. A complex facial treatment is priced between 25,000–50,000 Ft: with 3 clients per day, monthly revenue can reach 1.5–3 million Ft.
features.highlight: One device – multiple revenue streams (treatments + products + series).

training.headline: Operator training – within an officially registered adult education program
training.intro: Comprehensive operator training is provided for the HydraScan PRO+ device, included in the price of the device. With this training you'll be able to start working confidently and independently, with no unanswered questions.
items: HydraScan PRO+ operating principles and treatment heads
Interpretation and practical use of the AI skin analysis system
OxyPod active capsule use for different skin concerns
Treatment protocols for different skin types
Client communication and digital client card management
closingParagraphs: Thanks to our complete educational materials, protocol booklets and training resources, you don't have to worry later either – all important information is at your disposal.

If you'd like hands-on training with a live model, we offer this for an additional 69,990 Ft. The training price naturally includes the use of active ingredients, and we welcome your model with a barista-quality coffee and refreshments.

expertQuote.quote: The HydraScan PRO+ is one of the best ROI investments for a salon thanks to its combination of hydrofacial and AI skin analysis. Clients see their skin condition and changes with their own eyes – this builds trust, return visits and product sales.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: Can desktop hydrofacial systems be effective too?
faq.answer: Yes, absolutely. Effectiveness is determined not by size but by technology and adjustment options. The HydraScan PRO+ 2026 has a professional vacuum system and multiple treatment functions, allowing full-value salon treatments.

faq.question: Is the device's vacuum/suction power adequate?
faq.answer: Yes. The vacuum range (−6 kPa to −86 kPa) is adjustable across a wide scale: gentle for sensitive skin, effective deep cleansing for problem skin. With proper settings it's neither 'too strong' nor too weak – the key is correct use, which is taught in detail during the training.

faq.question: What maintenance does the device require?
faq.answer: Daily maintenance is simple: rinse the tubing system with clean water after use, empty and clean the tanks, disinfect the treatment heads. This ensures hygienic operation and long lifespan.

faq.question: How often is service required?
faq.answer: With normal use there's no frequent mandatory service requirement. We recommend annual periodic checks; with intensive (daily) use, a quick service visit every 6 months. Proper cleaning significantly reduces service needs.

faq.question: What should I be especially careful about during use?
faq.answer: Use only liquids recommended for the device, avoid acidic, oily or particulate substances, use alcohol-free disinfectant, and don't leave the system standing with liquid after use. Following these prevents malfunctions.

faq.question: Can a beginner esthetician use it?
faq.answer: Yes. Operating the device is logical, and the training walks you through usage step by step, making it ideal for beginners. Basic treatments can be performed safely right after training; routine develops within a few weeks.

faq.question: How quickly does the device pay for itself?
faq.answer: Quick ROI is achievable with as few as 2-3 clients per day. A complex facial is priced between 25,000–50,000 Ft, so with 3 clients per day you can generate 1.5–3 million Ft monthly. Hydro treatments are in high demand and price well.

faq.question: Can it be combined with other treatments?
faq.answer: Yes, highly recommended. The HydraScan PRO+ is the perfect base treatment before or after carbon peeling, or before/after other devices. The skin analysis can be used before any other treatment, or as a complete service on its own.

faq.question: How much space does the device take?
faq.answer: Compact desktop design, so it fits comfortably in smaller treatment rooms. A dedicated HydraScan PRO+ trolley is also available for 79,990 Ft.

whatsIncluded: Sound Wave ultrasonic infusion treatment head
